learned_tones.conversion_logic: sell the viewer a believable life containing the product
prompt_fragments: product naturally used in a real space

learned_tones.conversion_logic: information clarity and proof carry more weight than decorative beauty
prompt_fragments: key specification text overlaid on the product image

items.design_observation: Reusable guide layout uses white cards, orange prompt boxes, bold hierarchy, and copy buttons to turn abstract style advice into executable prompt fragments.

decision_rules.reason: quality, trust, and considered desire drive the purchase
believability and peer-like immediacy reduce friction
specifications, benefits, comparisons, and offers are the buying reason

items.project_value: Adds a deterministic tone-selection layer before image prompting instead of choosing a style by vague taste.

rules: When two tones are genuinely plausible, prepare both as controlled A/B candidates.
Keep product, offer, audience, and message stable while changing only the creative tone where possible.
Let observed response data choose after publishing rather than promoting personal taste to a universal rule.
Retain the losing variant and context; it may fit a different account, category, or emotional state.
items.design_observation: A large decision-rule panel converts a long style guide into a fast operational choice, followed by a prompt section for immediate use.
items.guardrail: No response winner can be claimed until real account performance data exists.

observed_grid_grammar: black title band above a single expressive face or scene
white setup phrase followed by yellow punch phrase
large condensed bold text with very high contrast
embedded dialogue subtitle supplies a second curiosity layer
dark source/footer band separates footage from metadata
items.project_value: Shows how one fixed visual grammar can support many story topics without making every post identical.

observations: The profile repeats the exact thumbnail grammar seen in the grid, creating immediate account recognition.
Visible profile snapshot shows about 50.6K subscribers and 98 videos; this is a screenshot observation only.
The channel description is minimal, leaving the thumbnail system and story choices to define the brand.
items.project_value: Account identity can be held by repeatable typography, color roles, crop logic, and story promise while individual scenes remain variable.

items.visible_positioning: 이야기를 쌓고 시선을 올립니다. 드라마, 영화, 예능 그냥 보지 않습니다. 한 발 떨어져, 천천히 봅니다.
project_value: Strong model for a story account promise: not merely replaying clips but adding observation, structure, and interpretation.
The short manifesto can guide topic selection, narration pace, and caption voice across the account.
items.observed_metric: The screenshot displays 32,067,290 views; treat as a source observation, not a causal quality claim.

items.subject: Wonhee-focused entertainment grid
observed_grid_grammar: one recurring person anchors account recognition
black title band with white setup and pink emotional keyword
micro-stories vary across personality, habits, relationships, food, and reactions
small program identity appears consistently below footage
hook_families: contrast between desired image and actual personality
items.project_value: A person-centered stream can remain visually consistent while avoiding repetitive story angles.

items.visible_hook: 아직도 죽어라 쿠팡만 하세요? 3.3% 말고 33% 받아가세요!
ad_structure: place a familiar entertainment clip behind the interruption
insert a large locked-offer CTA panel
push the viewer to learn more
project_value: Reference for lead-generation ads around affiliate education or higher-margin partner programs.
Reference for number-contrast hooks, but the actual percentage must be verified before use.
items.quality_observation: The screen is visually crowded; the hook is strong but the ad overlay competes with footage and subtitles.
items.guardrail: Do not adopt the 33 percent claim or create an external campaign without verified terms and owner approval.

items.visible_claim: Provides old memes through recent viral GIFs with easy downloads for editing use.
project_value: Possible discovery source for reaction, meme, and short looping visual references.
Useful for concept and motion-reference lookup when a static card needs a motion variant.
items.design_observation: Pastel field, oversized black condensed source name, centered rounded information card, highlighted text, and page-number badge form a highly reusable resource-list carousel.

items.visible_claim: Searches memes, reactions, stickers, and short clips on a widely known GIF platform.
project_value: Possible discovery source for reaction and motion-reference assets.
Search vocabulary from the platform can help describe desired expressions and looping actions in generation prompts.
items.design_observation: The carousel preserves one card system while switching the background from lavender to yellow, demonstrating controlled variety inside a fixed layout.

cross_batch_learning: Prompt generation should begin with a tone decision based on purchase psychology and information needs.
A/B testing is for genuine ambiguity and must preserve context before interpreting results.
Account consistency comes from stable typography, color roles, framing, and editorial promise rather than identical topics.
Person-centered entertainment can diversify through many micro-story families while maintaining one visual identity.
Monetization hooks require claim verification even when their rhetorical structure is reusable.
External GIF sites can be stored as discovery references without being represented as connected production assets.
